name: 7-up Cake - Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the 7-Up into the cake mix and stir until combined.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to a mixing bowl and beat for two to three minutes at medium speed.
3. Pour the batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean and the cake begins to pull away from the sides of the pan.
5. Remove the cake from the oven and glaze with lemon glaze while still warm.
